sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111477" key="filoskwmmosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-σκωμμοσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n111477.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fondness for scoffing</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">jesting,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:161" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.161</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
